english: O beloved of Lakshmi, lotus-naveled, Garuda-bannered, Govinda
roman: Shriyah kanta Kamala nabha Garuda dhvaja Govinda

english: Lotus-eyed, with lotus feet, Padmanabha, Narayana
roman: Pundari kaksha padma pada Padmanabha Narayana

english: You who are devoted to protecting the fallen and distressed who take refuge
Ocean of compassion, lord of Lakshmi, enemy of demons — salutations to you
roman: Karunya jaladhe Shrisha asurare namo astu te

english: I seek refuge in Hari, in Hari, in Hari, O Lord
roman: Hari sharanam Hari sharanam Hari sharanam prabho

english: To the refuge of all beings, the remover of all sorrows
roman: Sarva bhuta sharanyaya sarva duhkha apharini

english: Whoever reads this Hari Sharanastakam with devotion
roman: Hari sharana ashtakam idam yah pathed bhakti samyutah

hindi: हरेः प्रसादं प्राप्नोति मोक्षं च परमं व्रजेत्॥
english: Attains the grace of Hari and goes to supreme liberation
roman: Hareh prasadam prapnoti moksham cha paramam vrajet
